flashcards.front: What is Weak Axiom of Revealed Preference (WARP)?
flashcards.back: Weak Axiom of Revealed Preference (WARP) is a fundamental concept in economics.

flashcards.front: Why is Weak Axiom of Revealed Preference (WARP) important?
flashcards.back: Weak Axiom of Revealed Preference (WARP) is essential for understanding Consumer Theory.
